heading: Rice research
label: 5943 Rice research
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 428c of this titleSection was enacted as part of the Rice Production Act of 1975, and not as part of subtitle H of title XVI of the Food, Agriculture, Conservation, and Trade Act of 1990 which comprises this subchapter.

children.heading: Regional and national research programs; rules; purposes
children.label: a Regional and national research programs; rules; purposes

children.text: to reduce fertilizer and herbicide usage in excess of production needs;
to develop varieties of rice more susceptible to complete fertilizer utilization;
to improve the resistance of rice plants to disease and to enhance their conservation and environmental qualities;
to increase the usage of rice and its processing byproducts;
to develop better husbandry practices in production and conservation of rice;
to develop more efficient rice storage practices;
to improve domestic and international marketing of rice; and

children.heading: Utilization of services of Federal, State, local governmental and private agencies; priority consideration
children.label: b Utilization of services of Federal, State, local governmental and private agencies; priority consideration
children.text: The Secretary shall, in implementing the program authorized in subsection (a), utilize the technical and related services of appropriate Federal, State, local governmental, and private agencies, with priority consideration for land grant universities, State experiment stations, and other agricultural institutions of higher learning.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations; use restriction
children.label: c Authorization of appropriations; use restriction
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated not more than $1,000,000 for the period ending , to carry out the provisions of this section. No funds authorized by this section shall be used for advertising or promotional activities.September 30, 1976
